jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - FabAlley - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
FabAlley invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FabAlley:
FabAlley is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabAlley!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
